title: Auto Optimization
description: This mod auto scans the the 10 chunks your in or the ones you loaded and sees for issue it can fix to improve your fps auto optimizing your fps without requring lots of work done
body:
AutoOptimizer is a lightweight client-side performance mod designed to automatically improve your FPS while you play. The mod continuously monitors your frame rate and, if it drops below the limit you set, it instantly activates smart optimization features to stabilize performance.

AutoOptimizer scans up to 13  nearby chunks around the player to detect common causes of lag such as excessive entities, particle overload, or heavy block updates. Once an issue is found, the mod applies safe, real-time adjustments to reduce strain on your client and boost FPS without interrupting gameplay.

Features:

Real-time FPS monitoring

Custom FPS threshold settings

Automatic lag detection within nearby chunks

Smart performance adjustments with no manual tweaking required

Fully client-side and server-safe

AutoOptimizer is built for players who want smoother gameplay without constantly changing video settings or installing multiple optimization mods. Just set your FPS limit once, and let the mod handle the rest

But in detail let me tell you what the mod does the mod scans the 10-30 chunks and Tries Culling enties And cull dropped items to rude client side lag while it also reduces partickles or turns them off entirely if your lagging that bad It can also cull distant players but this feature if turnerd off and can be turnerd on  One last thing this mod does is reduce render distance if someone thats causing lots of lagg in another chunk it unrenders it the mod doesn't scan the 10 chunks your in but the 10 of your chunks your in right now and the most recent 3 you left After the fps is boosted the mod auto restores your settings to not messs with your personal settings 

In the general tab you have 3 settings Fps threshold its auto set to 30 fps what it does is it auto activates the mod once your fps drops before 30 and tries to boost it Scan radious tells you how many chunks the mod would scan to boost your fps And Detection cooldown which is how long the mod takes before doing another scan in the background.
